name: erase_removes_below_lo
reason: Keys strictly below `lo` are outside [lo, hi) and must be preserved, not erased

name: empty_range_removes_key
reason: When lo >= hi the range [lo, hi) is empty so no key should ever be removed

name: erase_introduces_new_key
reason: Erase should never introduce a key absent from the original map

name: erase_changes_preserved_value
reason: A key outside the erase range that survives must retain its original mapped value

name: erase_removes_at_hi_boundary
reason: The key at `hi` is at the exclusive upper bound and must not be erased
